{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181945B04D39FD5555B109CCC8"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614787951876817688","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔不错，就是有点不严谨，诸葛晞到底是老几啊[笑哭][笑哭][笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772958866,"group_id":"7605877390878723096","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxFH4PH8ctB47au9E8QqRIM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"565565669783837","user_name":"卧龙升天凤雏落坡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"565565669783837","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7605877390878723096","book_info":{"abstract":"陆青穿越三国世界，成为诸葛亮的兄弟历史上没有出现过的诸葛晞，开始便是刘备三顾茅庐请诸葛亮出山。
诸葛晞对此却丝毫不感兴趣。
他只想抱哥哥的大腿，等刘备三分天下之后去谋个富贵。
但是事情却隐隐朝着他无法控制的方向发展。
“子察先生，可愿意来备麾下屈就？”
“子察先生所求，备无有不允。”
“从今以后，子察先生便是我军军师，诸位当以事我之礼事子察先生。”
而诸葛晞对此只有满脸的问号。
“ber，大耳贼，你有病啊！我不想当牛马，不想努力，只想抱大腿，享富贵！”
……
我叫刘玄德，汉室宗亲，天子皇叔，我这一生都在为了兴复汉室而努力。
后来，我前往南阳卧龙岗寻觅大才，卧龙先生。
也是这一天，我的脑海里经常出现一个声音……
曹操南下，我要丢弃妻子？不存在的！我要提前安排！
庞统以命换我入蜀机会？用不到了，益州已经被拿下。
糜芳叛变，二弟身死？我先把糜芳宰了！
……
多年以后，刘备兴复汉室登临皇位。
而诸葛晞却莫名的成为了兴复汉室第一功臣，新汉唯二的异姓王！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5c4ccd6f7238151c8a43e4c4f87c1b90~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"朝北游","author_id":"","book_id":"7605877390878723096","book_name":"三国：我被刘备听到了心声！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4152人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605877436277850648","read_count":"4152","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"144976"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"70","tags":"历史脑洞,古代,历史,腹黑,扮猪吃虎,三国,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o5c4ccd6f7238151c8a43e4c4f87c1b90~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445185&x-signature=TqhxwOoTI%2FY8zi1p5hxWyN%2F8ui0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"60682884324","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181945B04D39FD5555B109CCC8"}"},"rel
